name: German Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and chocolate in a double boiler, stirring often.
2. Remove from heat and gradually stir in milk.
3. Mix sugar, cornstarch, and salt; beat with eggs and vanilla.
4. Gradually blend in the chocolate mixture.
5. Pour into pie shells.
6. Mix coconut and pecans and sprinkle over filling.
7. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes. Filling will be soft but sets while cooling.
8. Cool at least 4 hours before cutting.
9. This is a very rich pie and especially good topped with whipped cream.
10. Serves 12
Source: "Mountain Measures" – Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
